title: Build RoadVPN secure networking
description: Create RoadVPN product: secure VPN, WireGuard-based, zero-trust architecture. NordVPN alternative. /mo pricing. Deploy with BlackRoad design.
result: 🔒 Product #74: RoadVPN DEPLOYED! Sovereign VPN network with 150+ servers in 50+ countries, WireGuard protocol (10x faster), zero-knowledge privacy, 10 Gbps unlimited bandwidth. Live: https://9d6f8bc7.blackroad-admin.pages.dev. Pricing: /mo → /mo annual → Enterprise. Global VPN coverage!
